complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.本章逐一介绍每种 2D 检测工具的参数与配置方法。每个工具单独成页。: This chapter walks through the parameters and configuration of each 2D inspection tool, one page per tool.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.本章节详细介绍 2D 检测工具（检测项）及其参数含义。每个元件可包含一个或多个检: This chapter documents each 2D inspection tool (also called an *inspection item*) and the meaning of its parameters. A component can carry one or more inspection items; selecting the component in the **Template Editor** exposes their parameters in the right-hand panel.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.在阅读各工具参数前，先了解几个贯穿全篇的通用概念：: Before reading the per-tool parameter pages, get familiar with a few concepts that recur throughout:
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**AI 异常分数**：基于 AI 模型的检测会输出一个 0~1 的异常分数；接: **AI anomaly score**: AI-driven inspections output an anomaly score between 0 and 1; values near 0 indicate the sample looks normal, values near 1 indicate a large deviation. Use the score-distribution histograms to compare OK vs. NG samples and pick a sensible threshold.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**颜色范围与有效比例（Valid Ratio）**：基于颜色的检测在 ROI: **Color range and Valid Ratio**: color-based inspections binarize pixels inside the ROI using an **HSV color range**; pixels passing the range are counted as *valid pixels*, and the valid ratio is defined as :math:`100 \times \dfrac{\text{valid pixel count}}{\text{ROI area}}`. The decision checks whether the valid ratio falls inside the configured **Valid Ratio Range**. A single ROI can be configured with multiple color ranges, each evaluated independently.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**颜色公式（Color Formula）**：定义如何从像素计算颜色特征。可选: **Color Formula**: defines how the color feature is computed from each pixel. Choose **HSV** (center hue plus start/end hue, with a value range), or a **Tricolor** formula such as ``2B-R-G`` (a linear combination configured with X / Y / Z / A coefficients and a threshold).
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**对齐（Alignment）**：部分检测在判定前先将元件图像与标准样本自动对: **Alignment**: some inspections automatically register the inspected component image against the golden reference before deciding, eliminating false positives caused by positional shift.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**启用可视化（Enable Visualization）**：评估后叠加显示二: **Enable Visualization**: after an evaluation run, overlays the binarized mask and intermediate detection results to help with tuning. Carries extra compute cost, so enable only while debugging.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**使用共享参数（Use Shared Parameters）**：元件加入封装: **Use Shared Parameters**: once a component is placed in a package or part-number group, it shares parameters with the group by default. Turn the switch off to tune this specific instance independently — the component no longer inherits the group's settings.

complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.检测元件本体的贴装缺陷，包括缺件、错件、损件、偏移、旋转与极性等。ROI 应覆盖: Detects mounting defects on the component body — missing, wrong, damaged, shifted, rotated, or reverse-polarity components. The ROI should cover the body surface of the part.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.模板编辑器中绘制对应 ROI 后，在参数面板中配置该工具的参数。: Draw the corresponding ROI in the Template Editor, then configure the tool's parameters in the parameter panel.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.本体检测ROI示例: Example of a Body inspection ROI
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**旋转角度 (°)（Max Rotation Angle）**：元件本体相对标: **Max Rotation Angle (°)**: angular deviation of the component body from the golden pose; flagged NG when the deviation exceeds this threshold.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**X 偏移 (mm)（Shift X）/ Y 偏移 (mm)（Shift Y）: **Shift X (mm) / Shift Y (mm)**: translational deviation of the inspected body from the golden body; flagged NG when the shift exceeds the threshold.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**常规检测（Significant Defect Check）**：对元件本体: **Significant Defect Check**: AI anomaly-score check for obvious body defects — missing, wrong, or severely misoriented components.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.本体AI分数分布示例: Example AI score distribution for body inspection
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**损件检测（Subtle Defect Check）**：针对本体的破损、缺口: **Subtle Defect Check**: targets fine-grained body anomalies such as chips, cracks, and damage. The image is first aligned to the golden sample before the AI anomaly-score check, so positional drift doesn't trigger false positives.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**缺件检测（Missing Check）**：判定该位置是否缺少元件。: **Missing Check**: decides whether the component is missing at this location.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**增强缺件检测（Enhanced Missing Check）**：利用对位结: **Enhanced Missing Check**: uses the alignment result to fire an earlier missing-component alert when the part appears absent. Experimental — disable it if alignment misfires cause false positives.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**极性检测（Polarity Check）**：判断元件极性方向是否正确。检测: **Polarity Check**: verifies that the component is mounted in the correct polarity. The inspected image is aligned first, then the polarity feature is learned and evaluated inside the **Polarity ROI** to catch reverse polarity. The decision is also driven by the AI anomaly score.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**极性检测灵敏度（Polarity Sensitivity）**：调节极性判定: **Polarity Sensitivity**: controls how aggressively polarity is flagged. Higher sensitivity surfaces more polarity NGs.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**极性 ROI（Polarity ROI）**：点击 *设置 ROI* 或在显: **Polarity ROI**: click *Set ROI* or drag directly on the canvas to draw the local region used for polarity evaluation — typically the area containing the polarity marking.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**启用遮罩（Enable Mask）**：对含有不固定字符 / 图案的区域进行: **Enable Mask**: masks out areas that contain variable characters or patterns so they don't disturb the AI decision.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**LED 灯极性识别不出**：手动开启 **极性检测** 子项；如频繁失败，可: **LED polarity can't be recognized**: enable the **Polarity Check** sub-item manually. If it fails repeatedly, request additional LED polarity samples in the next model iteration.

complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.在焊料 ROI 内用 HSV 颜色范围对像素二值化，计算有效比例并与设定范围比较: Binarizes pixels inside the solder ROI using an HSV color range, computes the valid ratio, and compares it against the configured band to decide OK/NG. Used for solder inspection on SMD joints.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.模板编辑器中绘制对应 ROI 后，在参数面板中配置该工具的参数。: Draw the corresponding ROI in the Template Editor, then configure the tool's parameters in the parameter panel.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**核心思路**：在焊料 ROI 内用 **HSV 颜色范围** 对像素二值化，: **Core idea**: inside the solder ROI, binarize pixels using an **HSV color range**, compute the **valid ratio**, and compare it with the configured range to decide OK/NG. A single ROI can carry multiple color ranges (for example, the blue channel for the sloped solder fillet plus the red channel for the flat pad), each with its own thresholds.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**颜色公式（Color Formula）**：选择 HSV 或三色（Trico: **Color Formula**: choose between **HSV** and **Tricolor**; when **Tricolor** is chosen, configure the **Tricolor X / Y / Z / A** coefficients.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**中心色调（Center Hue）/ 中心饱和度（Center Saturat: **Center Hue / Center Saturation**: the reference point inside the HSV color wheel (HSV mode only).
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**起始色调（Start Hue）/ 终止色调（End Hue）**：色盘圆环边: **Start Hue / End Hue**: two points on the color-wheel ring that, together with the center point, form the wedge-shaped valid hue range.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**起始明度（Start Value）/ 终止明度（End Value）**：限: **Start Value / End Value**: brightness band for valid pixels.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**有效比例范围（Valid Ratio Ranges）**：每组颜色范围对应的: **Valid Ratio Ranges**: the lower and upper valid-ratio limits per color range; an inspection is OK when the ratio lands inside the band.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**有效比例列表（Valid Ratio List）**：评估样本得到的各 RO: **Valid Ratio List**: per-ROI valid-ratio statistics gathered from evaluated samples — useful when picking a sensible range.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**启用可视化（Enable Visualization）**：显示二值化 Ma: **Enable Visualization**: displays the binarization mask and ratio statistics. Recommended only while tuning.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**使用共享参数（Use Shared Parameters）**：开启后，对同: **Use Shared Parameters**: when on, every feature of this type within the same component shares one parameter set; turn it off to tune a single feature independently.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.颜色范围支持 **三角形抽色** 配置：在 HSV 颜色空间中，用一个三角形圈出: Color ranges support a **triangular picker** in HSV space — a triangle bounds the target color cluster. The three vertices correspond to the center color, the start color, and the end color. Compared with the classic *rectangular* HSV range, the triangle is tighter and picks up fewer unintended colors. Drag any of the three vertices directly on the HSV swatch to adjust the range.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.可同时配置多个颜色范围（例如：蓝色焊点 + 红色助焊剂）。系统对每个范围分别做二: Multiple color ranges can be configured at once (for example, blue solder + red flux). Each range is binarized and counted independently, and the final decision uses the **union** of all ranges:
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.任一颜色范围匹配的像素都会被纳入\"焊锡有效像素\"统计。: A pixel matching any range counts as a *valid solder pixel*.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.颜色范围之间是 **OR** 关系，不会因为某一范围阈值过严而漏判其他颜色覆盖区: The ranges are combined with **OR** logic, so an over-tight threshold on one range doesn't cause the other color-covered area to be missed.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.各范围的统计比例可在右侧参数面板中独立查看。: The per-range ratios are visible independently in the right parameter panel.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.如果不需要某个范围，可将其 *阈值* 调至 0，或在颜色范围列表中删除该范围。: To disable a range, set its *threshold* to 0 or delete it from the color-range list.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.参数面板顶部提供 **抽色二值化预览** 切换，开启后可在画布上实时叠加显示当前: The toggle at the top of the parameter panel — **color-pick binarization preview** — overlays the binarized pixel distribution of the current color range on the canvas in real time, giving immediate visual feedback while you tune.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊锡阈值参数被 AI 更新拉飞**：避免把分数远超阈值的焊锡反馈为\"无错误: **Solder threshold drifts after AI updates**: avoid annotating samples with a score well past the threshold as *no defect* — the AI will learn the wrong threshold. Under **System Settings → Model Updater**, turn off **AI update overrides**; once off, AI updates can only shift values toward the configured ratio limits and won't break past them.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**参数更新计算不准确**：检查训练集中是否有打分极端的反馈图片，移除明显错误或: **Parameter updates seem wrong**: inspect the training set for feedback images with extreme scores; remove obviously incorrect or outlier annotations and retrain. Alternatively, turn off **Update Color Range / Update Color Ratio** — the *Update Parameters* button on the programming page will then leave those parameters untouched.

complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.在引脚阵列上自动生成引脚子框，结合 AI 缺陷检测识别桥接、缺焊、虚焊、少锡等。: Automatically generates per-lead sub-frames across the lead array and combines them with AI defect detection to catch solder bridges, missing solder, cold solder, and insufficient solder.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.模板编辑器中绘制对应 ROI 后，在参数面板中配置该工具的参数。: Draw the corresponding ROI in the Template Editor, then configure the tool's parameters in the parameter panel.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**用途**：在引脚阵列上自动生成引脚子框，结合 AI 缺陷检测识别桥接、缺焊、: **Purpose**: generate per-lead sub-frames across the lead array and combine them with AI defect detection to catch solder bridges, missing solder, cold solder, and insufficient solder. The triangle marker on the ROI points to the *outside* of the leads.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚数量（Lead Count）**：在 ROI 内自动均分生成对应个数的子: **Lead Count**: the ROI is divided into this many equal sub-ROIs.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚宽度 (mm)（Lead Width）**：匹配实际引脚宽度，使子 RO: **Lead Width (mm)**: matches the physical lead width so each sub-ROI aligns with the corresponding lead.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚角度（Lead Angle）**：引脚相对 ROI 的方向角。: **Lead Angle**: the lead direction relative to the ROI.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚阈值（Lead Threshold）**：基于每个引脚子 ROI 的 A: **Lead Threshold**: AI-score threshold applied to each per-lead sub-ROI.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**桥接阈值（Bridge Threshold）**：相邻引脚间连锡（短路）的判: **Bridge Threshold**: threshold for detecting solder bridges (shorts) between adjacent leads.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**桥接宽度 (mm)（Bridge Width）/ 间隙宽度 (%)（Gap: **Bridge Width (mm) / Gap Width (%)**: define the width of the bridge-detection band between adjacent leads. Configure it in millimeters or as a percentage of the lead gap; the band is centered between the leads to avoid lead-edge interference.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚忽略列表（Lead Ignore List）/ 桥接忽略列表（Bridg: **Lead Ignore List / Bridge Ignore List**: lists of leads or bridges to exclude from inspection (numbered left to right; mind the feature box orientation).
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**启用可视化（Enable Visualization）**：显示引脚子框与检: **Enable Visualization**: shows the per-lead sub-frames and the detection results overlaid on the canvas.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**使用同步参数（Use sync param）**：开启后，对同一组件下所有同: **Use sync param**: when on, every lead feature of this type within the same component shares one parameter set; turn it off to tune a single feature independently.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚末端误报多**：若元件末端没有红色焊料，关闭 **引脚末端** 子检测。: **Frequent false positives on the lead tip**: if the lead tip has no red solder, turn off the **Lead Tip** sub-check.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊盘检测误报多**：焊盘检测把红色作为有效区域；若元件引脚没有明显焊盘区域，: **Frequent false positives on the pad**: pad inspection treats red as the valid region; if the leads don't expose a clear pad area, turn off the **Pad** sub-check.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**短引脚定位不准**: **Short leads are localized poorly**: use **Short-lead mode**, which inspects the whole lead as one region and tracks more reliably.
